working_on.task: Fixed thinking token bug by disabling thinkingBudget and filtering response parts.
working_on.notes: Unified synchronization to Mutex. Fixed batch translation prompt wrapping.

recent_changes.description: Fixed Gemini 2.5/3 thinking tokens bug: disabled thinking and filtered parts in extractText.
Fixed Double-Prompting bug in translateTitleBatch call chain.
Fixed Mixed Synchronization (Mutex vs @Synchronized) and removed dead code synchronous methods.

errors_encountered.error: Mixed Synchronization (Mutex vs @Synchronized) on shared state
errors_encountered.solution: Unify on Mutex and remove @Synchronized methods.
Changed tryTranslate to receive raw prompt and handle wrapping at the specific helper level.

decisions_made.reason: They were dead code and used dangerous mixed synchronization patterns.
